note: amplitude-touch proxy: clifft=sum(2^active_k) over active_k_history; MDAM=sum(budget.charge resident). MDAM compiled-path C++ internal rotation work is UNDERCOUNTED by the budget (charges survivor once), so MDAM flop_x is a lower bound. Wall is measured ground truth. clifft via clifft.sample (batched C++); MDAM per-shot Python (fast config: compiled_core+fused+S1+S2+B).

rows.bottleneck: post-reduce/init (Python control plane; near-stabilizer, ~0 dense work)
purge 60% + rot 27% (R_Y off-diagonal: measured-magic purge + general-Pauli rotations)
